case_title: SIGNATURE WIRE CORP. vs. MCMILLAN TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DENNIS D. MILLER RE POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGNATURE WIRE CORP.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGNATURE WIRE CORP.
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT. WRIT MAY ISSUE 29-SEP-01.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIGNATURE WIRE CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCMILLAN TECHNOLOGIES, INC. $12,132.45 PRINCIPAL, $189.00 INTEREST, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,429.45 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGNATURE WIRE CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MCMILLAN TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGNATURE WIRE CORP. SERVED AUG-30-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCMILLAN TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
